mission.title: opentelemetry-operator: APIs package should not import `github.com/goccy/go-yaml`
mission.description: APIs package should not import `github.com/goccy/go-yaml`. Requested by 5+ users.

steps.title: Check current opentelemetry-operator deployment
steps.description:
Verify your opentelemetry-operator version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator
helm list -n opentelemetry-operator 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working opentelemetry-operator installation.

steps.title: Review opentelemetry-operator configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant opentelemetry-operator configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator
kubectl get configmap -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentelemetry-operator
```
### Component(s)

_No response_

### Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

steps.title: Apply the fix for APIs package should not import `github.com/goccy/go-yaml`
steps.description:
- Replace `sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/scheme.Builder` with `k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime.SchemeBuilder` in both `groupversion_info.go` files.
- This removes the controller-runtime dependency from the apis packages, preparing them for extraction into a standalone Go sub-module.

- `make
```yaml
### Describe the solution you'd like

Import types package such as `github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator/apis/v1alpha1` should not bring indirect dependencies such as `github.com/goccy/go-yaml`.



### Describe alternatives you've considered

_No response_

### Additional context

_No response_

### Tip

<sub>[React](https://github.blog/news-insights/product-news/add-reactions-to-pull-requests-issues-and-comments/) with 👍 to help prioritize this issue. Please use comments to provide useful context, avoiding `+1` or `me too`, to help us triage it. Learn more [here](https://opentele
```

steps.title: Upgrade opentelemetry-operator to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade opentelemetry-operator:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade opentelemetry-operator opentelemetry-operator/opentelemetry-operator --namespace opentelemetry-operator
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-operator
helm list -n opentelemetry-operator
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator
kubectl get events -n opentelemetry-operator --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "APIs package should not import `github.com/goccy/go-yaml`" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
- Replace `sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/scheme.Builder` with `k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime.SchemeBuilder` in both `groupversion_info.go` files.
- This removes the controller-runtime dependency from the apis packages, preparing them for extraction into a standalone Go sub-module.

- `make test` — all 1947 tests pass, 0 failures.
